title: HNLU Signs MoU with National Chi Nan University of Taiwan
description: Hidayatullah National Law University (HNLU) of Raipur has entered into a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with the National Chi Nan University of Taiwan to strengthen academic and research cooperation between the two institutions.Speaking on the occasion, Prof. Vivekanandan, Vice Chancellor of HNLU stated that the MoU would facilitate collaboration between the two institutions in interdisciplinary areas and further strengthen academic and bilateral relations between India and Taiwan. Dr. Dong-s
